ocr_findings.description: Callout box header 'つしが出る！' rendered as 'つしが出る！' — mascot icon lost but text content identical

reviewer_notes: Removable storage devices table (CD/DVD/Blu-ray Disc/USBメモリ/SDカード) with 記録方法 column fully captured. Key capacity values (700MB, 4.7GB, 25GB) present. キャッシュメモリ section including diagram description and explanatory paragraph captured correctly. Page number 386 present. No character errors or missing content detected.
